hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储古尔斯比表示，他担心“令人担忧但激烈”的气候下的通胀；【FINANCE】人工智能论文震撼整个股市的研究公司再次发出重大呼吁；【CRYPTO】花旗集团表示，稳定币奖励限制可能会减缓但无法阻止 Circle 的 USDC。

items.title: Fed's Goolsbee says he's worried about inflation in 'fraught but intense' climate
items.summary: In a CNBC interview, the central banker said policymaking is difficult in the current environment.
items.title_zh: 美联储古尔斯比表示，他担心“令人担忧但激烈”的气候下的通胀
items.summary_zh: 这位央行行长在接受 CNBC 采访时表示，在当前环境下制定政策很困难。

items.title: The research firm whose AI paper knocked the whole stock market is out with another big call
items.summary: Citrini Research said persistently high energy prices risk weighing on consumers and corporate earnings, creating a tough backdrop for equities.
items.title_zh: 人工智能论文震撼整个股市的研究公司再次发出重大呼吁
items.summary_zh: Citrini Research 表示，持续居高不下的能源价格可能会给消费者和企业盈利带来压力，给股市带来艰难的背景。

items.title: Stablecoin rewards restrictions can slow but not stop Circle's USDC, says Citigroup
items.summary: USDC adoption hinges on volume, not circulation, the bank said
items.title_zh: 花旗集团表示，稳定币奖励限制可能会减缓但无法阻止 Circle 的 USDC
items.summary_zh: 该银行表示，USDC 的采用取决于数量，而不是流通量

items.title: Bitcoin miners face breakeven pressure as AI pivot accelerates, CoinShares says
items.summary: Head of Research James Butterfill said some listed bitcoin miners could derive as much as 70% of revenue from AI by the end of 2026.
items.title_zh: CoinShares 表示，随着人工智能加速发展，比特币矿工面临盈亏平衡压力
items.summary_zh: 研究主管 James Butterfill 表示，到 2026 年底，一些上市的比特币矿商可能会从人工智能中获得多达 70% 的收入。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Israel Says It Killed Iranian Naval Commander as Trump Raises Pressure on Tehran
items.summary: Israel said that an airstrike had killed Alireza Tangsiri, a key player in Iran’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. President Trump warned Iranian officials to consider his peace proposal “before it is too late.”
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普向德黑兰施加压力，以色列称其杀死了伊朗海军指挥官
items.summary_zh: 以色列表示，伊朗封锁霍尔木兹海峡的关键人物阿里雷扎·坦西里(Alireza Tangsiri)在一次空袭中丧生。特朗普总统警告伊朗官员“在为时已晚之前”考虑他的和平提议。

items.title: MARA Holdings higher by 10% after selling $1.1 billion in bitcoin to fund debt buyback
items.summary: The strategic move cuts debt, reduces dilution risk, and strengthens the balance sheet for expansion into AI and energy infrastructure, said the company.
items.title_zh: MARA Holdings 出售 11 亿美元比特币为债务回购提供资金后股价上涨 10%
items.summary_zh: 该公司表示，这一战略举措削减了债务，降低了稀释风险，并加强了向人工智能和能源基础设施扩张的资产负债表。

items.title: Crypto slides as oil spike, macro jitters trigger derivatives unwind
items.summary: Bitcoin dropped below $70,000 and ether fell toward $2,000 as rising oil prices, falling equities and weak liquidity sparked risk-off flows and pressured altcoins.
items.title_zh: 随着油价飙升，加密货币下滑，宏观恐慌引发衍生品平仓
items.summary_zh: 由于油价上涨、股市下跌和流动性疲软引发避险资金流并对山寨币造成压力，比特币跌破 70,000 美元，以太币跌向 2,000 美元。

items.title: Bitcoin DAT trade is concentrating in Michael Saylor’s Strategy as treasury demand fades elsewhere
items.summary: Strategy accounted for nearly all recent BTC digital-asset treasury purchases, with other firms’ share dropping from 95% to about 2%, CryptoQuant data show.
items.title_zh: 随着其他地方的国债需求减弱，比特币 DAT 交易集中在 Michael Saylor 的策略中
items.summary_zh: CryptoQuant 数据显示，近期几乎所有 BTC 数字资产国债购买都以策略为主，其他公司的份额从 95% 下降至 2% 左右。

items.title: Augmenting citizen science with computer vision for fish monitoring
items.summary: MIT Sea Grant works with the Woodwell Climate Research Center and other collaborators to demonstrate a deep learning-based system for fish monitoring.
items.title_zh: 通过鱼类监测的计算机视觉增强公民科学
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院海洋格兰特与伍德韦尔气候研究中心和其他合作者合作，展示了一种基于深度学习的鱼类监测系统。

items.title: World has 'never experienced' soaring refining margins like this, TotalEnergies CEO tells CNBC
items.summary: TotalEnergies CEO Patrick Pouyanné on the Iran war, the $1 billion deal with the White House, investment in the U.S., and more.
items.title_zh: TotalEnergies 首席执行官告诉 CNBC，世界“从未经历过”如此飙升的炼油利润
items.summary_zh: TotalEnergies 首席执行官 Patrick Pouyanné 谈论伊朗战争、与白宫达成的 10 亿美元协议、对美国的投资等。

items.title: Jamie Dimon says Iran war makes Middle East peace prospects better in the long term
items.summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon issued an optimistic viewpoint on Middle East peace, weeks into the war with Iran.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙表示，从长远来看，伊朗战争使中东和平前景更好
items.summary_zh: 在与伊朗的战争爆发几周后，摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙对中东和平发表了乐观的看法。

items.title: Apollo gives investors only 45% of requested withdrawals from $15 billion private credit fund
items.summary: The withdrawals show that Apollo didn't avoid the rush of investor redemptions plaguing rivals, driven by concern over private credit loans to software firms.
items.title_zh: Apollo 仅向投资者提供 150 亿美元私人信贷基金提款请求的 45%
items.summary_zh: 这些撤资表明，由于对向软件公司提供私人信贷的担忧，阿波罗并没有避免困扰竞争对手的投资者赎回潮。

items.title: Volume in stock and oil futures surged minutes before Trump's market-turning post
items.summary: The timing of the earlier volume spikes — across both equities and crude — caught the attention of traders.
items.title_zh: 在特朗普发表扭转市场的言论前几分钟，股票和石油期货成交量激增
items.summary_zh: 股票和原油早期成交量飙升的时机引起了交易员的注意。

items.title: BlackRock’s Larry Fink warns against market timing, says missing best days can halve returns
items.summary: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink said staying invested through periods of turmoil has historically delivered far stronger returns.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的拉里·芬克 (Larry Fink) 对市场时机发出警告，称错过最佳时机可能会使回报减半
items.summary_zh: 贝莱德首席执行官拉里·芬克表示，从历史上看，在动荡时期保持投资会带来更强劲的回报。

items.title: European Parliament gives conditional approval to EU-US trade deal
items.summary: The agreement would see EU tariffs on US goods reduced to zero while US tariffs on EU imports set at 15%.
items.title_zh: 欧洲议会有条件批准欧盟与美国贸易协议
items.summary_zh: 该协议将使欧盟对美国商品的关税降至零，而美国对欧盟进口商品的关税则设定为 15%。

items.title: Trump confirms May meeting with Xi Jinping as Iran war forces postponement
items.summary: Trump's delayed meeting with Xi Jinping will be the first visit to China by a US president since 2017.
items.title_zh: 特朗普确认五月会见习近平，因伊朗战争部队推迟
items.summary_zh: 特朗普推迟与习近平的会面将是2017年以来美国总统首次访华。

items.title: Cuban Patients Are Dying Because of U.S. Blockade, Doctors Say
items.summary: Cuban health care was once the pride of the island. Now the U.S. oil blockade is upending even basic medical care.
items.title_zh: 医生称古巴患者因美国封锁而死亡
items.summary_zh: 古巴的医疗保健曾经是这个岛国的骄傲。现在，美国的石油封锁甚至颠覆了基本的医疗服务。

items.title: Olympic Committee Announces a Broad Ban of Transgender Athletes in Women’s Events
items.summary: Kirsty Coventry, the first woman to lead the International Olympic Committee, has frequently spoken about what she says is the need to protect women’s competitions at the Olympic Games.
items.title_zh: 奥委会宣布广泛禁止跨性别运动员参加女子赛事
items.summary_zh: 科斯蒂·考文垂是第一位领导国际奥委会的女性，她经常谈到保护奥运会女子比赛的必要性。

items.title: Zelensky Says U.S. Is Conditioning Ukraine’s Security Guarantees on Donbas Surrender
items.summary: President Volodymyr Zelensky of Ukraine said that President Trump “still chooses a strategy of putting more pressure on the Ukrainian side.”
items.title_zh: 泽连斯基称美国正在以顿巴斯投降为条件向乌克兰提供安全保证
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰总统泽连斯基表示，特朗普总统“仍然选择向乌克兰方面施加更大压力的策略”。

items.title: In Rural Ukraine, Basic Health Care Is a Casualty of War
items.summary: Elderly people in isolated villages are going without medicine. One woman said she hadn’t seen a doctor in four years.
items.title_zh: 在乌克兰农村，基本医疗保健是战争的牺牲品
items.summary_zh: 偏僻村庄的老人没有药物。一位女士说她已经四年没有看过医生了。

items.title: Trump’s Threats to Europe Put Its Leaders in a Double Bind Over Iran
items.summary: European politicians risk angering their voters if they join America’s war. Yet they could also face domestic upheaval if they take no action to reopen shipping routes that Iran has blocked and ease an energy crisis.
items.title_zh: 特朗普对欧洲的威胁使其领导人在伊朗问题上陷入双重困境
items.summary_zh: 如果欧洲政客加入美国的战争，他们就有可能激怒选民。然而，如果他们不采取行动重新开放伊朗封锁的航线并缓解能源危机，他们也可能面临国内动荡。

items.title: U.S. midterms pack major digital assets punch as Stand With Crypto preps strategy
items.summary: The terrain of Congress is likely to shift considerably even as the crypto sector continues to chase fundamental legislation.
items.title_zh: 美国中期选举将主要数字资产作为“支持加密货币”的准备策略
items.summary_zh: 即使加密货币行业继续追求基本立法，国会的格局也可能会发生很大变化。

items.title: Brazil passes law turning seized crypto into public-security war chest
items.summary: The law lets authorities use crypto seized during investigations and expands their power to freeze, block or seize funds in a bid to crack down on criminal organizations.
items.title_zh: 巴西通过法律将扣押的加密货币转变为公共安全资金
items.summary_zh: 该法律允许当局使用在调查期间查获的加密货币，并扩大其冻结、阻止或扣押资金的权力，以打击犯罪组织。

items.title: Nvidia faces certified class action over crypto revenue disclosures
items.summary: A federal judge certified a class of Nvidia investors alleging billions of dollars in undisclosed crypto-related GPU revenue.
items.title_zh: 英伟达因加密货币收入披露面临经过认证的集体诉讼
items.summary_zh: 一名联邦法官对 Nvidia 的一批投资者进行了认证，指控其未公开的加密货币相关 GPU 收入达数十亿美元。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Rain (RAIN)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #25.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：雨 (RAIN)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 25 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #33.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 33 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Katana (KAT)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #605.
items.title_zh: 热门加密货币：Katana (KAT)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#605。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #105.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 105。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Siren (SIREN)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #56.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：海妖 (SIREN)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 56。

items.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
items.summary: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.
items.title_zh: 帮助开发者为青少年打造更安全的人工智能体验
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 使用 gpt-oss-safeguard 为开发人员发布基于提示的青少年安全策略，帮助缓解 AI 系统中特定年龄的风险。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
items.summary: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Astral
items.summary_zh: 加速 Codex 的发展，为下一代 Python 开发工具提供动力

items.title: AI system learns to keep warehouse robot traffic running smoothly
items.summary: This new approach adapts to decide which robots should get the right of way at every moment, avoiding congestion and increasing throughput.
items.title_zh: 人工智能系统学习保持仓库机器人交通平稳运行
items.summary_zh: 这种新方法可以随时决定哪些机器人应该获得通行权，从而避免拥堵并提高吞吐量。

items.title: Wristband enables wearers to control a robotic hand with their own movements
items.summary: By moving their hands and fingers, users can direct a robot to play piano or shoot a basketball, or they can manipulate objects in a virtual environment.
items.title_zh: 腕带使佩戴者能够通过自己的动作控制机械手
items.summary_zh: 通过移动他们的手和手指，用户可以指挥机器人弹钢琴或投篮球，或者他们可以操纵虚拟环境中的物体。

items.title: MIT and Hasso Plattner Institute establish collaborative hub for AI and creativity
items.summary: Jointly led by the MIT Morningside Academy for Design, MIT Schwarzman College of Computing, and the Hasso Plattner Institute in Potsdam, the hub will foster a dynamic community where computing, creativity, and human-centered innovation meet.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院和哈索普拉特纳研究所建立人工智能和创造力合作中心
items.summary_zh: 该中心由麻省理工学院晨兴设计学院、麻省理工学院施瓦茨曼计算学院和波茨坦哈索·普拉特纳研究所联合领导，将培育一个充满活力的社区，让计算、创造力和以人为本的创新相遇。

items.title: Generative AI improves a wireless vision system that sees through obstructions
items.summary: With this new technique, a robot could more accurately detect hidden objects or understand an indoor scene using reflected Wi-Fi signals.
items.title_zh: 生成式人工智能改进了无线视觉系统，可以穿透障碍物
items.summary_zh: 借助这项新技术，机器人可以使用反射的 Wi-Fi 信号更准确地检测隐藏物体或了解室内场景。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 02/23/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Monday, 02/23/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Evaluating Reversal Potential in Niche Alternative ETFs [Quantpedia] Alternative ETFs sit at an unusual intersection of pub
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 2 月 23 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 2 月 23 日星期一 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！评估利基另类 ETF 的逆转潜力 [Quantpedia] 另类 ETF 位于酒吧的一个不寻常的交叉点

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: index falls 3.2% as all constituents trade lower
items.summary: Aave (AAVE) declined 5.6% and Cardano (ADA) dropped 4.8%, leading the index lower from Wednesday.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：由于所有成分股均走低，指数下跌 3.2%
items.summary_zh: Aave (AAVE) 下跌 5.6%，Cardano (ADA) 下跌 4.8%，带领该指数从周三开始走低。

items.title: Everyone's calling bitcoin resilient, may be it's just complacent
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for March 26, 2026
items.title_zh: 每个人都称比特币有弹性，也许它只是自满
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 3 月 26 日天气预报

items.title: Bitcoin has traded in a tight range for nearly 50 days – but this is not a "bear flag"
items.summary: Extended range-bound price action signals structural consolidation rather than a textbook bearish continuation, despite rising downside risks.
items.title_zh: 比特币近 50 天一直在窄幅区间内交易——但这并不是“熊旗”
items.summary_zh: 尽管下行风险上升，但价格区间的扩大表明结构性整合，而不是教科书般的看跌延续。

items.title: CZ-owned Trust Wallet launches AI agents that can execute crypto trades
items.summary: The Trust Wallet Agent Kit infrastructure lets AI agents execute real crypto transactions across more than 25 blockchains.
items.title_zh: CZ 旗下的 Trust Wallet 推出可以执行加密货币交易的人工智能代理
items.summary_zh: Trust Wallet Agent Kit 基础设施允许 AI 代理跨超过 25 个区块链执行真正的加密交易。

items.title: MARA sells 15,133 bitcoin for $1.1 billion to fund convertible note repurchase
items.summary: MARA sold 15,133 bitcoin for $1.1 billion to repurchase $1 billion in convertible notes, cutting debt 30%.
items.title_zh: MARA 以 11 亿美元的价格出售 15,133 个比特币，为可转换票据回购提供资金
items.summary_zh: MARA 以 11 亿美元的价格出售了 15,133 个比特币，以回购 10 亿美元的可转换票据，从而减少了 30% 的债务。

items.title: Stand With Crypto launches voter hub, endorses candidates ahead of November midterm elections
items.summary: Stand With Crypto is throwing its weight behind a slate of congressional candidates as it rolls out a new “voter hub."
items.title_zh: Stand With Crypto 推出选民中心，在 11 月中期选举前支持候选人
items.summary_zh: Stand With Crypto正在推出一个新的“选民中心”，大力支持一系列国会候选人。

items.title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.
items.title_zh: 深入了解我们的模型规格方法
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 的模型规范如何作为模型行为的公共框架，随着人工智能系统的进步，平衡安全性、用户自由和责任。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
items.summary: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 安全漏洞赏金计划简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出安全漏洞赏金计划，以识别人工智能滥用和安全风险，包括代理漏洞、提示注入和数据泄露。

items.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
items.summary: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 基金会的最新动态
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 基金会宣布计划投资至少 10 亿美元用于治疗疾病、经济机会、人工智能复原力和社区项目。

items.title: Creating with Sora Safely
items.summary: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.
items.title_zh: 与 Sora 一起安全地创作
items.summary_zh: 为了解决最先进的视频模型和新的社交创作平台带来的新的安全挑战，我们构建了以安全为基础的 Sora 2 和 Sora 应用程序。我们的方法以具体的保护为基础。

items.title: Build a Domain-Specific Embedding Model in Under a Day
items.title_zh: 在一天之内构建特定领域的嵌入模型

items.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
items.summary: Lyria 3 is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最新的音乐生成模型 Lyria 3 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Lyria 3 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: An overview of SpeciesNet, our open-source AI model that is helping people around the world protect and conserve wildlife.
items.title_zh: 我们的开源人工智能模型 SpeciesNet 如何帮助促进野生动物保护
items.summary_zh: SpeciesNet 概述，我们的开源人工智能模型正在帮助世界各地的人们保护野生动物。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in February
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from February 2026
items.title_zh: 我们二月份公布的最新人工智能新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 2 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Advancing international trade research and finding community
items.summary: Sojun Park, a postdoc at the Center for International Studies, has learned much from his research on intellectual property as well as his interactions with students and mentors at MIT.
items.title_zh: 推进国际贸易研究和寻找社区
items.summary_zh: Sojun Park 是国际研究中心的博士后，他从知识产权研究以及与麻省理工学院学生和导师的互动中学到了很多东西。

items.title: On algorithms, life, and learning
items.summary: Operations research expert Dimitris Bertsimas delivered the annual Killian Lecture, providing a look at the past and future of his work.
items.title_zh: 论算法、生活、学习
items.summary_zh: 运筹学专家 Dimitris Bertsimas 发表了年度基利安讲座，回顾了他工作的过去和未来。

items.title: A better method for identifying overconfident large language models
items.summary: This new metric for measuring uncertainty could flag hallucinations and help users know whether to trust an AI model.
items.title_zh: 识别过度自信的大型语言模型的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 这种测量不确定性的新指标可以标记幻觉，并帮助用户知道是否信任人工智能模型。

items.title: Former SEC Chair Jay Clayton says regulators would scrutinize trading ahead of Trump post
items.summary: "Any move like that in advance of any announcement, the regulators are going to look at," said Clayton, former SEC chair.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会前主席杰伊·克莱顿表示，监管机构将在特朗普上任之前审查交易
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会前主席克莱顿表示：“在任何公告之前，监管机构都会关注任何此类举措。”

items.title: Moody's cuts rating on private credit fund run by KKR and Future Standard to junk as bad loans grow
items.summary: The move by Moody's is the latest sign of distress in private credit; retail investors have been rushing to withdraw funds, from Blackstone to Apollo.
items.title_zh: 由于不良贷款增加，穆迪将 KKR 和未来标准运营的私人信贷基金评级下调至垃圾级
items.summary_zh: 穆迪此举是私人信贷陷入困境的最新迹象。散户投资者纷纷撤资，从黑石到阿波罗。

items.title: U.S. executives, from Apple to Eli Lilly, revamp their push into the world's second-largest economy at the China Development Forum
items.summary: More than 80 global executives traveled to Beijing this weekend for the state-organized China Development Forum.
items.title_zh: 从苹果公司到礼来公司等美国高管在中国发展高层论坛上调整了进军世界第二大经济体的计划
items.summary_zh: 本周末，80 多名全球高管前往北京参加国家组织的中国发展论坛。

items.title: Prepare for turbulence - how a prolonged Middle East conflict could reshape how we fly
items.summary: The Gulf's hub airports made long-distance travel cheaper - but now their future looks unclear.
items.title_zh: 为动荡做好准备——长期的中东冲突如何重塑我们的飞行方式
items.summary_zh: 海湾地区的枢纽机场使长途旅行变得更加便宜，但现在它们的未来看起来并不明朗。

items.title: 'A game-changing moment for social media' - what next for big tech after landmark addiction verdict?
items.summary: The ruling could be the beginning of the end of social media as we know it, writes the BBC's technology editor Zoe Kleinman.
items.title_zh: “社交媒体改变游戏规则的时刻”——在具有里程碑意义的成瘾判决之后，大型科技公司下一步将何去何从？
items.summary_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 技术编辑佐伊·克莱曼 (Zoe Kleinman) 写道，这项裁决可能是我们所知的社交媒体终结的开始。

items.title: 'I have no recollection of anything' - Epstein survivor says she was drugged and raped
items.summary: A survivor of Epstein's abuses spoke publicly for the first time to BBC Newsnight about her experience of being raped and drugged by the sex offender.
items.title_zh: “我不记得任何事情”——爱泼斯坦幸存者说她被下药并被强奸
items.summary_zh: 爱泼斯坦性侵案的一名幸存者首次向英国广播公司《新闻之夜》公开讲述了她被性犯罪者强奸和下药的经历。

items.title: New India bill to amend transgender rights sparks protests
items.summary: The bill seeks to change how transgender people are legally recognised and their right to self-identify.
items.title_zh: 印度新法案修改跨性别者权利引发抗议
items.summary_zh: 该法案旨在改变跨性别者在法律上的认可方式及其自我认同的权利。

items.title: Army commander convicted of Guinea stadium massacre dies in prison
items.summary: Aboubacar Sidiki Diakité was convicted over the 2009 massacre in which more than 150 people were killed.
items.title_zh: 因几内亚体育场大屠杀被定罪的陆军指挥官在监狱中去世
items.summary_zh: 阿布巴卡尔·西迪基·迪亚基特 (Aboubacar Sidiki Diakité) 因 2009 年造成 150 多人死亡的大屠杀而被定罪。

items.title: Australia's sunscreen regulator wants new rules after recent product scandal
items.summary: The medicines regulator is proposing stricter rules after more than a dozen products were recalled.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚防晒霜监管机构希望在最近的产品丑闻后制定新规则
items.summary_zh: 在十多种产品被召回后，药品监管机构提出了更严格的规定。

items.title: Zimbabwe says 15 nationals killed after being lured to fight for Russia
items.summary: Zimbabwe says it is engaging the Russian government to repatriate bodies and bring home those still alive.
items.title_zh: 津巴布韦称15名国民在被引诱为俄罗斯而战后被杀
items.summary_zh: 津巴布韦表示正在与俄罗斯政府合作遣返尸体，并将仍然活着的人带回家。

items.title: 'We are being choked': Philippines transport workers strike over fuel costs
items.summary: It comes as a ship carrying barrels of Russian crude oil arrived in the Philippines earlier this week.
items.title_zh: “我们被窒息了”：菲律宾运输工人因燃料成本而罢工
items.summary_zh: 本周早些时候，一艘载有俄罗斯原油的船只抵达菲律宾。

items.title: The Sudden Death of a Man Who Told Chinese Kids How to Succeed
items.summary: The influencer Zhang Xuefeng was known for no-nonsense, some said cynical, advice about how to win in China’s educational rat race. He died at 41.
items.title_zh: 一个告诉中国孩子如何成功的人突然去世
items.summary_zh: 有影响力的人张雪峰因就如何在中国教育的激烈竞争中获胜提出严肃的、有人说是愤世嫉俗的建议而闻名。 41 岁时去世。

items.title: India Appears Sidelined as Pakistan Tries to Play Peacemaker in Iran
items.summary: Hours before a call between President Trump and India’s prime minister, American officials urged India to focus on shared goals and ignore differences.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦试图在伊朗扮演和平缔造者之际，印度似乎被边缘化
items.summary_zh: 在特朗普总统与印度总理通话前几个小时，美国官员敦促印度专注于共同目标，忽视分歧。

items.title: How U.S.A.I.D. Birth Control Meant for Africa Was Ruined
items.summary: The Trump administration had options for offloading contraceptives once destined for Africa, a newly obtained memo shows. Instead, it has let them collect dust and go bad.
items.title_zh: 美国国际开发署如何非洲的生育控制被毁了
items.summary_zh: 新获得的一份备忘录显示，特朗普政府可以选择卸载曾经运往非洲的避孕药具。相反，它让它们积满灰尘并变质。

items.title: After ‘Sausage Making,’ European Lawmakers Approve U.S. Trade Deal
items.summary: The agreement that President Trump struck with the European Union has cleared a major hurdle that delayed it for months.
items.title_zh: “香肠制作”之后，欧洲立法者批准美国贸易协议
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统与欧盟达成的协议扫清了拖延数月之久的重大障碍。

items.title: Coinbase, Fannie Mae bring crypto-backed mortgages to homebuyers
items.summary: The crypto exchange is working with financial technology mortgage firm Better, a Fannie Mae-approved mortgage seller.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 和房利美为购房者提供加密抵押贷款
items.summary_zh: 该加密货币交易所正在与金融技术抵押贷款公司 Better 合作，该公司是房利美 (Fannie Mae) 批准的抵押贷款卖家。

items.title: USDT0 goes live on payments-focused blockchain Tempo
items.summary: USDT0 tokens are minted using LayerZero's Omnichain Fungible Token standard and maintain a 1:1 backing with USDT.
items.title_zh: USDT0 在支付区块链 Tempo 上上线
items.summary_zh: USDT0 代币使用 LayerZero 的 Omnichain Fungible Token 标准铸造，并与 USDT 保持 1:1 的支持。

items.title: UK sanctions crypto-linked marketplace Xinbi amid crackdown on Southeast Asia scam centres
items.summary: Officials said the measures aim to target the financial infrastructure behind scams, including platforms used to sell stolen data.
items.title_zh: 英国因打击东南亚诈骗中心而制裁加密货币市场Xinbi
items.summary_zh: 官员们表示，这些措施旨在针对诈骗背后的金融基础设施，包括用于出售被盗数据的平台。

items.title: DeFi lender Moonwell faces governance attack as $1,800 vote push threatens $1 million in funds
items.summary: Moonwell is facing a governance attack after a $1,800 token purchase was used to push a proposal that could drain over $1 million.
items.title_zh: DeFi 贷款机构 Moonwell 面临治理攻击，1,800 美元的投票推动威胁到 100 万美元的资金
items.summary_zh: Moonwell 在使用 1,800 美元的代币购买来推动一项可能消耗超过 100 万美元的提案后，面临着治理攻击。

items.title: Circle Ventures leads Tazapay Series B extension, bringing the round to $36 million
items.summary: Circle Ventures led Tazapay’s Series B extension to $36M as the firm expands licensing and go-to-market efforts across emerging markets.
items.title_zh: Circle Ventures 领投 Tazapay B 轮延期，本轮融资金额达 3600 万美元
items.summary_zh: Circle Ventures 带领 Tazapay 的 B 轮融资扩展至 3600 万美元，该公司在新兴市场扩大许可和上市工作。

items.title: Fannie Mae to accept crypto-backed mortgages in first for US housing finance: WSJ
items.summary: Fannie Mae is preparing to accept crypto-backed mortgages, allowing borrowers to pledge digital assets as collateral.
items.title_zh: 房利美将首先接受美国住房融资的加密抵押贷款：《华尔街日报》
items.summary_zh: 房利美 (Fannie Mae) 正准备接受加密货币支持的抵押贷款，允许借款人质押数字资产作为抵押品。

items.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.
items.title_zh: 推动 ChatGPT 中的产品发现
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 引入了由 Agentic Commerce Protocol 支持的更丰富、视觉沉浸式购物，从而实现产品发现、并排比较和商家集成。

items.title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
items.summary: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.
items.title_zh: 我们如何监控内部编码代理的错位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用思想链监控来研究内部编码代理的错位——分析现实世界的部署以检测风险并加强人工智能安全保障。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
items.summary: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 简介
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 是 GPT-5.4 更小、更快的版本，针对编码、工具使用、多模式推理以及大容量 API 和子代理工作负载进行了优化。

items.title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
items.summary: OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI.
items.title_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布日本青少年安全蓝图，将青少年安全放在首位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布了日本青少年安全蓝图，为使用生成人工智能的青少年引入了更强有力的年龄保护、家长控制和福祉保障。

items.title_zh: 评估语音代理 (EVA) 的新框架

items.summary: We are bringing Lyria 3 to the tools where professionals work and create every day.

items.summary_zh: 我们将 Lyria 3 引入专业人士每天工作和创作的工具中。

items.summary: We're expanding Personal Intelligence across AI Mode in Search, the Gemini app and Gemini in Chrome.

items.summary_zh: 我们正在将个人智能扩展到搜索中的 AI 模式、Gemini 应用程序和 Chrome 中的 Gemini。

items.summary: Google is making new investments, building new tools and developing code security to improve open source security.

items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在进行新的投资、构建新的工具并开发代码安全性，以提高开源安全性。

items.summary_zh: 一项新的谷歌人工智能计划旨在改善生活在澳大利亚偏远社区的人们的心脏健康状况。
